title: PlanCreatedPayload (v1)
description: Payload of a `plan_created` event — plan materialized with N steps. See spec/plan-lifecycle-v1.md §5.1.

title.description: Human-readable title summarizing the plan's goal.

total_steps.description: Total number of steps the plan was materialized with.

goal_id.description: Owning goal when the plan serves a scheduled or on-demand goal.
